title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following effects that social media has had on entertainment and culture, then decide which two are the most significant.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some effects that social media has had on entertainment and culture.
Now decide which two effects of social media on entertainment and culture are the most significant.
